# CWE-515 positive: covert quota flag shared across handlers (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-515-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
)

var quotaCovertFlag int

func SetQuotaCovert(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	_ = r.ParseForm()
	if r.FormValue("over") == "1" {
		quotaCovertFlag = 1
	} else {
		quotaCovertFlag = 0
	}
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}

func ProbeQuotaCovert(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	if quotaCovertFlag == 1 {
		w.Write([]byte("over_limit"))
		return
	}
	w.Write([]byte("ok"))
}
